top_findings.summary: The skill description is extremely vague about its specific purpose ("Execute automatic activation for all google vertex ai multimodal operations"), yet it requests broad, powerful permissions including Write, Edit, and unrestricted Bash execution (Bash(general:*), Bash(util:*)). This allows the skill to perform arbitrary file modifications and execute any system command, which is excessive and dangerous for a skill whose stated functionality is to trigger/execute predefined Vertex AI operations. There is no justification for why a simple trigger/activation skill requires full filesystem write/edit access and the ability to run any bash command. This represents a severe permission overreach.
